creator: george@eps.ufsc.br
text:
I installed the FREEBSD 3.0 from cd and choose the vim 5.3 package. When I tried to use it, so it claims for the libXm.so.1, which is the Motif library, that is commercial and I don't have it. I have tried with lesstif and it doesn't works. I think that the package must be linked staticaly or linked with athena widgets insted of Motif

Fix: 

Link staticaly?
	Link with Athena?
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install FreeBSD 3.0
	Install vim
	try run gvim or vim
